points.title: Unawatuna Golden Crescent Beach
points.description: Iconic kilometer-long crescent-shaped golden sand beach protected by coral reefs, offering perfect swimming conditions, soft sand, and crystal-clear turquoise waters ideal for families and water enthusiasts.

points.title: Japanese Peace Pagoda (Rumassala)
points.description: Magnificent white Buddhist pagoda built in 1986 by Japanese monks atop mystical Rumassala Hill, offering breathtaking 360-degree views of Unawatuna Bay, Galle Fort, harbor, and the endless Indian Ocean.

points.title: Vibrant Coral Reef Gardens
points.description: World-class coral reef ecosystem directly accessible from beach featuring colorful corals, tropical fish species, moray eels, and frequent sea turtle sightings in crystal-clear protected waters.

points.title: Yatagala Raja Maha Viharaya Temple
points.description: Ancient hilltop Buddhist temple complex with historic dagoba offering panoramic views of Unawatuna Bay, traditional architecture, and active religious ceremonies especially during Esala festival.

points.title: Jungle Beach (Hidden Paradise)
points.description: Secluded pristine beach accessible via 15-minute jungle trek through Rumassala Hill's unique biodiversity, featuring untouched natural beauty, excellent snorkeling, and peaceful tropical solitude.
